message:
fix: use --merged flag instead of --state merged

gh search prs --state only accepts open|closed, not merged
Use --merged boolean flag for merged PRs

files.patch:
@@ -72,11 +72,11 @@
 #             > /tmp/metrics-data/help-wanted-created.json
 #
 #           # Search 2: PRs commented/reviewed on (get all with pagination)
-#           # Use separate searches for merged and open PRs with commenter filter
+#           # Use commenter filter to get only PRs where user commented (not authored)
 #           gh search prs \
 #             --owner kubestellar \
 #             --commenter clubanderson \
-#             --state merged \
+#             --merged \
 #             --updated ">=${{ steps.dates.outputs.date_60 }}" \
 #             --limit 1000 \
 #             --json number,title,url,state \
@@ -5898,11 +5898,11 @@ jobs:
             > /tmp/metrics-data/help-wanted-created.json
 
           # Search 2: PRs commented/reviewed on (get all with pagination)
-          # Use separate searches for merged and open PRs with commenter filter
+          # Use commenter filter to get only PRs where user commented (not authored)
           gh search prs \
             --owner kubestellar \
             --commenter clubanderson \
-            --state merged \
+            --merged \
             --updated ">=${{ steps.dates.outputs.date_60 }}" \
             --limit 1000 \
             --json number,title,url,state \

@@ -45,11 +45,11 @@ jobs:
             > /tmp/metrics-data/help-wanted-created.json
           
           # Search 2: PRs commented/reviewed on (get all with pagination)
-          # Use separate searches for merged and open PRs with commenter filter
+          # Use commenter filter to get only PRs where user commented (not authored)
           gh search prs \
             --owner kubestellar \
             --commenter clubanderson \
-            --state merged \
+            --merged \
             --updated ">=${{ steps.dates.outputs.date_60 }}" \
             --limit 1000 \
             --json number,title,url,state \
